calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Karen Suri, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Ray Lee Thompson, Jr., in court, Executor.

At the outset, counsel offers testimony as to why she failed to appear at the last calling. After consideration of counsel's testimony, the court orders sanctions in the amount of $250.00, pursuant to CCP 128. Counsel offers a report on the status of the Estate. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant and reduce statutory fees to the attorney. The Statutory fee issue is briefly discussed but no objection to the court's tentative ruling is presented.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Continued To Feb-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to attorney Karen Suri to appear on Feb-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear at the Dec-27-2023 hearing. Karen Suri is Ordered to Show Cause on Feb-06-2024, at 9:00 a.m. why she should not be ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $250, pursuant to CCP Section 128, for failure to appear at the Dec-27-2023 hearing. The subject matter is continued to Feb-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nam. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to attorney Karen Suri and Personal Representative Ray Lee Thompson, Jr. to appear on Jan-16-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at the Dec-27-2023 hearing. Karen Suri is Ordered to Show Cause, on Jan-16-2024, at 9:00 a.m., why she should not be ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $250, pursuant to CCP Section 128, for failing to appear at the Dec-27-2023 hearing. The subject matter is continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Oct-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karen Suri, via Zoom, for Ray Lee Thompson Jr., Personal Representative.

The court confirms with counsel that an Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) has not been filed and that distributions have not been made. Counsel advises that an I&A has been forwarded to the court for filing. The court acknowledges the documents currently pending in the court's e-filing queue and advises counsel that the Petition for Final Distribution is likely to be rejected because it shows today's hearing date in the caption. Counsel is instructed to resubmit the petition without a date as it will be given a future hearing date when it is filed.

The Status Hearing is continued to Oct-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karen Suri, via Zoom, for Ray Lee Thompson, Jr., Personal Representative.

Ms. Suri reports that a Petition for Final Distribution is being drafted and that it should be filed shortly.

The matter is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karen Suri appeared by telephone for Ray Thpmpson (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the petition does not indicate whether the Petitioner is seeking limited or full authority. Ms. Suri stated that at this point her Client is asking for full authority. The Court waives the defect in the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 30, 2005 is admitted to probate. Ray Lee Thompson, Jr. is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. Status on close of estate is set for August 15, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. If not, an appearance will be required on that date. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karen Suri appeared by telephone for Ray Thompson.

The Court stated that the Probate Examiner's notes need to be addressed and that the tentative ruling provides the requirement of the supplement needing to be signed and verified by the Petitioner. Ms. Suri apologized to the Court stating that she thought she had provided it, that wires got crossed and that she can do so. The Court also informed Ms. Suri that the confidential statement needs to be filed separately, that she cannot e-file it and that she will need to mail it in for filing. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
